/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/provider-parser-tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/tests/test_provider_parsers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/src/parsers/ProviderParsers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/src/utils/JsonUtils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/provider-parser-tests.dir/src/utils/StatusUtils.cpp.o" -o provider-parser-tests  /usr/lib/libQt6Test.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
